title: Nojiko Reveals Nami’s Past
scene: On pages 8–11, Nojiko’s account of the past reveals how Nami, Bellemere, and Cocoyasi Village were damaged by Arlong’s arrival. Bellemere chooses to acknowledge Nami and Nojiko as her daughters, even when it costs her life.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Mind your own busi-ness!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Agh...

dialogue.speaker: Genzo
dialogue.text: Gen!

dialogue.speaker: Genzo
dialogue.text: I'm... I'm coming to save you, Nami!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: We won't let you through!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: So just leave Nami here and go!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's fine! Don't worry about me! You don't have to come and help me!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: So please! I don't want anyone to die anymore!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Go lightly on them...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: They are our first source of income, after all.

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: All the ships in the village have been sunk...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Even our idea,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: of sending Nami and Nojiko away on a boat is now...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: We were naive...! The Marines won't come to save us either.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: This island is now completely under their control...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Belliemere must've already realized back then,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: that it was impossible for us to escape from this situation...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And that the only way to survive was to live under their rule...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Nami's been taken away too...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Belliemere...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What am I supposed to do...?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: We've figured out where the arlong pirates are.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It seems they're planning on setting up base on this island!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The time for us to decide is NOW...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: shall we go out fighting, braving death,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: or accept their rule, under which we'll live under constant fear of death,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: And hope that the government will one day come to save us!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: No... the only ones in the government that can hope to match these monsters,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: are those from the Marine Headquarters in Grand Line...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: But the marine headquarters already have their hands full with the grand line,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: So hoping for them to come all the way out to these remote regions is useless!

summary: This part deepens Nami’s backstory, showing how family, money, and survival became tied to Arlong’s control over the village.
